name: New Horizon Health Limited
summary: New Horizon Health Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the research and development of screening products for colorectal, cervical, and other types of cancer in the People's Republic of China. The company is also involved in the research and development of medical diagnostic technology; provision of technical transfers and consultation, technical, and medical services, as well as financing services; manufacturing and sales of medical and laboratory equipment, and fecal occult blood test kits; and technological import and export activities. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.
